examples: This easy-to-do chignon is girly and pretty.
Hair stylists often choose an updo that features a high chignon that has loose ends.
The new Mrs. Barack Obama wore her hair pulled back into a classic chignon for her wedding day.
For Mr. Forsythe's "Rearray, " the choreographer costumed Ms. Guillem in sleek slacks, a trim top and stocking feet, all in gray-greens, with her hair fixed in a neat, low chignon.
In fact, it is safe to say that her hairdos change with her every ensemble, going from classic chignon at one event to wild and curly to another, from loose and wavy to beehive.
